Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetFrameBufferCaptureRegion method specifies the region of the bound framebuffer image to capture.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void SetFrameBufferCaptureRegion(const V2UInt32& imageOffsetInPixels = V2UInt32(0, 0), const V2UInt32& imageRegionInPixels = V2UInt32(0, 0));

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The top-left pixel offset of the framebuffer region to capture.
The pixel dimensions of the framebuffer region to capture. A zero value captures the remaining image from the offset.
